name: Cantor Equity Partners VI, Inc.
business: We are a blank check company incorporated on April 30, 2021 as a Cayman Islands exempted company for the purpose of effecting the Business Combination. We are focusing our search on companies operating in the financial services, digital assets, healthcare, real estate services, technology and software industries.

catalysts.event: Must consummate Business Combination by February 6, 2028
catalysts.sentence: We have until February 6, 2028 (24 months from the closing of the Initial Public Offering), or until such earlier liquidation date as the Board may approve or such later date as our shareholders may approve pursuant to the Memorandum and Articles, to consummate the Business Combination.
